class.name: FlatBufferBuilder
class.brief_description: Class for building and serializing FlatBuffer data.
class.description: [FlatBufferBuilder] provides methods to construct FlatBuffer objects. It supports adding scalar types, Godot-specific types (as structs), strings, and vectors. Once the buffer is built, it can be finished and converted to a [PackedByteArray] for storage or transmission.

method.name: add_bytes
method.description: Adds an offset to a byte vector field at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_bool
method.description: Adds a boolean element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_bool_default
method.description: Adds a boolean element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_byte
method.description: Adds a signed 8-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_byte_default
method.description: Adds a signed 8-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_double
method.description: Adds a double-precision float element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_double_default
method.description: Adds a double-precision float element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_float
method.description: Adds a single-precision float element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_float_default
method.description: Adds a single-precision float element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_int
method.description: Adds a signed 32-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_int_default
method.description: Adds a signed 32-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_long
method.description: Adds a signed 64-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_long_default
method.description: Adds a signed 64-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_short
method.description: Adds a signed 16-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_short_default
method.description: Adds a signed 16-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_ubyte
method.description: Adds an unsigned 8-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_ubyte_default
method.description: Adds an unsigned 8-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_uint
method.description: Adds an unsigned 32-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_uint_default
method.description: Adds an unsigned 32-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_ulong
method.description: Adds an unsigned 64-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_ulong_default
method.description: Adds an unsigned 64-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_element_ushort
method.description: Adds an unsigned 16-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_element_ushort_default
method.description: Adds an unsigned 16-bit integer element to the current table at [param voffset], but only if it differs from the [param default] value.

method.name: add_offset
method.description: Adds an offset field to the current table at [param voffset].

method.name: add_variant
method.description: Adds a Godot [Variant] of the given [param type] to the current table at [param voffset]. Supported types include scalars and Godot structs (Vector2, Rect2, Color, etc.).

method.name: clear
method.description: Clears the builder, resetting its internal state but keeping the allocated buffer.

method.name: create
method.description: Creates a new [FlatBufferBuilder] with an initial buffer [param size].

method.name: create_variant
method.description: Encodes a Godot [Variant] (like a Vector3, String or PackedArray) and returns an offset position.

method.name: create_vector_float32
method.description: Creates a vector of 32-bit floats from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_float64
method.description: Creates a vector of 64-bit floats from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_int8
method.description: Creates a vector of 8-bit signed integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_int16
method.description: Creates a vector of 16-bit signed integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_int32
method.description: Creates a vector of 32-bit signed integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_int64
method.description: Creates a vector of 64-bit signed integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_of_custom_struct
method.description: Creates a vector of custom FlatBuffer structs from an [Array] of [PackedByteArray] (each representing a struct). [param element_size] must match the struct's size in bytes.

method.name: create_vector_of_table
method.description: Creates a vector of tables by calling [param create_func] for each element in [param array].

method.name: create_vector_of_union
method.description: Creates a vector of unions by calling [param create_func] for each element in [param array]. Returns a [PackedInt32Array] containing two offsets: the vector of types and the vector of values.

method.name: create_vector_offset
method.description: Creates a vector of offsets from a [PackedInt32Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_uint8
method.description: Creates a vector of 8-bit unsigned integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_uint16
method.description: Creates a vector of 16-bit unsigned integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_uint32
method.description: Creates a vector of 32-bit unsigned integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: create_vector_uint64
method.description: Creates a vector of 64-bit unsigned integers from an [Array] and returns its offset.

method.name: end_table
method.description: Ends building a table and returns its offset. [param start] is the value returned by [method start_table].

method.name: finish
method.description: Finishes building the buffer, setting the provided [param table_offset] as the root of the FlatBuffer.

method.name: get_buffer
method.description: Returns the finished buffer as a [PackedByteArray].

method.name: get_size
method.description: Returns the current size of the built buffer.

method.name: reset
method.description: Resets the builder and its internal buffer.

method.name: start_table
method.description: Starts building a table.
